case_title: JOSE PANLILIO et al VS. KATHLEEN D O'BRIEN et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-11-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR.
